ascribe 0.1.0.9000

    • Build a Citation Scanner
  • Changelog

Build a Citation Scanner

Source: vignettes/build-a-citation-scanner.qmd

For a complete, real-world implementation of a package citation scanner built with ascribe, see stanflow.

ascribe separates AST parsing from citation generation. This guide demonstrates building a citation scanner targeting Stan packages (cmdstanr, posterior, bayesplot, rstan).

Build the package universe

build_universe_data() extracts exported functions, R6 methods, and origin mappings for re-exported functions.

stan_pkgs <- c("cmdstanr", "posterior", "bayesplot", "rstan")
universe <- build_universe_data(stan_pkgs)
names(universe)

Run build_universe_data() in an environment where all target packages are installed.

Scan source code

scan_usage() inspects .R, .Rmd, and .qmd files for package attachments (library(), require()) and function calls (pkg::fun() or unqualified calls resolved by attachment order).

project <- tempfile("stan-project-")
dir.create(project)
script <- file.path(project, "analysis.R")

writeLines(
  c(
    "library(cmdstanr)",
    "library(posterior)",
    "fit <- cmdstan_model('model.stan')$sample()",
    "draws <- fit$draws()",
    "summarise_draws(draws)",
    "bayesplot::mcmc_hist(draws)"
  ),
  script
)

usage <- scan_usage(
  path = project,
  allowed_packages = universe$packages,
  export_index = universe$export_index,
  origin_map = universe$origin_map,
  strict = TRUE,
  quiet = TRUE
)

usage
unlink(project, recursive = TRUE)

strict = TRUE warns on and omits calls that cannot be resolved unambiguously.

Generate citations

cite_usage() formats BibTeX entries for detected packages and functions.

citations <- cite_usage(usage)
writeLines(citations)

Override default package or function citations with package_citations and function_citations.

Save scanner data in sysdata.rda

generate_universe_sysdata() precompiles universe data into R/sysdata.rda for downstream package distribution.

# data-raw/sysdata.R
generate_universe_sysdata(
  packages = c("cmdstanr", "posterior", "bayesplot", "rstan"),
  prefix = "stan",
  file = "R/sysdata.rda"
)

This saves .stan_pkgs, .stan_exports, .stan_export_index, .stan_origin_map, and .stan_pkg_versions for fast loading without runtime package inspection.

On this page

Developed by Visruth Srimath Kandali.
